Excellent! Now I have all the information needed. Let me provide a comprehensive overview:

## Comprehensive Codebase Overview

### 1. Monorepo Structure

This is a **Bun-based TypeScript monorepo** using Turbo as the build orchestrator. Structure:

```
root/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/           (React 19 Vite SPA - main UI)
│   ├── desktop/       (Electron app wrapper)
│   ├── server/        (Node.js CLI/backend)
│   └── marketing/     (Marketing site)
├── packages/
│   ├── contracts/     (Type definitions & schemas using Effect)
│   └── shared/        (Shared utilities)
└── scripts/          (Build and dev scripts)
```

**Package Manager**: Bun 1.3.9 / Node 24.13.1

---

### 2. `packages/contracts` - Type Contracts & Schemas

**Purpose**: Single source of truth for all type definitions and validation schemas

**Key exports** (`src/index.ts`):
- `baseSchemas.ts` - Base branded ID types using Effect schemas
  - `ThreadId`, `ProjectId`, `CommandId`, `EventId`, `MessageId`, `TurnId`
  - `ProviderItemId`, `RuntimeSessionId`, `RuntimeItemId`, `RuntimeRequestId`, `RuntimeTaskId`
  - `ApprovalRequestId`, `CheckpointRef`
  - `TrimmedString`, `TrimmedNonEmptyString`, `NonNegativeInt`, `PositiveInt`
  - `IsoDateTime`
  
- Other modules: `ipc.ts`, `terminal.ts`, `provider.ts`, `providerRuntime.ts`, `model.ts`, `ws.ts`, `keybindings.ts`, `server.ts`, `git.ts`, `orchestration.ts`, `editor.ts`, `project.ts`

**Tech Stack**:
- Effect library (functional programming)
- TSDown for build (compiles to CJS + ESM + DTS)
- Vitest for testing

**Import**: Via workspace reference `@t3tools/contracts`

---

### 3. `packages/shared` - Shared Utilities

**Purpose**: Reusable business logic and utilities

**Key exports** (from `package.json`):
- `./model` - Model selection and normalization logic
  - Functions: `getModelOptions()`, `getDefaultModel()`, `normalizeModelSlug()`, `resolveModelSlug()`, `getReasoningEffortOptions()`, `getDefaultReasoningEffort()`
- `./git` - Git operations
- `./logging` - Logging utilities
- `./shell` - Shell command execution
- `./Net` - Network utilities

**Tech Stack**: Same as contracts (Effect + TypeScript)

---

### 4. `apps/web/src` - React Web Application

#### Directory Structure:

```
src/
├── components/
│   ├── ui/                 (40+ shadcn-like UI components)
│   ├── BranchToolbar.tsx
│   ├── ChatView.tsx       (Main chat interface)
│   ├── DiffPanel.tsx      (Code diff viewer)
│   ├── Sidebar.tsx        (Navigation sidebar)
│   ├── PlanSidebar.tsx    (Plan/task sidebar)
│   ├── GitActionsControl.tsx
│   ├── ProjectScriptsControl.tsx
│   ├── ThreadTerminalDrawer.tsx
│   └── Icons.tsx
├── routes/
│   ├── __root.tsx         (Root layout)
│   ├── _chat.tsx          (Chat layout)
│   ├── _chat.index.tsx    (Chat home)
│   ├── _chat.$threadId.tsx (Thread view)
│   └── _chat.settings.tsx (Settings page)
├── lib/
│   ├── utils.ts           (cn() helper for Tailwind merging)
│   ├── diffRendering.ts
│   ├── gitReactQuery.ts
│   ├── providerReactQuery.ts
│   ├── projectReactQuery.ts
│   ├── serverReactQuery.ts
│   ├── turnDiffTree.ts
│   └── [TanStack React Query hooks]
├── hooks/
│   └── [Custom React hooks]
├── appSettings.ts         (App settings store - NO THEME YET)
├── store.ts              (Main Zustand store)
├── terminalStateStore.ts
├── composerDraftStore.ts
├── index.css             (Tailwind + theme variables)
└── [Logic test files, utilities]
```

#### Key Feature: No Theme System Currently

**App Settings** (`appSettings.ts`):
- Uses Effect Schema for validation
- Stored in localStorage (`t3code:app-settings:v1`)
- Current settings:
  - `codexBinaryPath` / `codexHomePath`
  - `confirmThreadDelete`
  - `enableAssistantStreaming`
  - `codexServiceTier` ("auto" | "fast" | "flex")
  - `customCodexModels` (array)
- **NO theme/dark mode setting exists**

---

### 5. Styling & CSS Approach

#### **Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS Variables**

**Configuration**:
- `vite.config.ts` uses `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
- `index.css` imports `@import "tailwindcss"`
- No separate `tailwind.config.js` file (Tailwind 4 doesn't require it)
- `components.json` (shadcn config) specifies:
  - Style: "base-mira"
  - Icons: Lucide
  - CSS variables enabled
  - Aliases: `~/*` path mapping

#### **CSS Variable Theme System**

Root variables defined in `index.css`:

**Light theme (`:root`)**:
```css
--radius: 0.625rem;
--background: var(--color-white);
--foreground: var(--color-neutral-800);
--primary: oklch(0.488 0.217 264);  /* Purple-ish */
--border: --alpha(var(--color-black) / 8%);
--input: --alpha(var(--color-black) / 10%);
--destructive: var(--color-red-500);
/* ... many more color/spacing vars */
```

**Dark theme (`:root { @variant dark { ... } }`)**:
```css
@variant dark {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-neutral-950) 95%, var(--color-white));
  --foreground: var(--color-neutral-100);
  --primary: oklch(0.588 0.217 264);  /* Lighter purple */
  /* ... dark variants */
}
```

**Custom variant**:
```css
@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark, .dark *));
```

This allows dark mode to be applied via `.dark` class on any element (not just `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)`)

#### **Component Styling**

**Button example**:
- Uses `class-variance-authority` for variants
- All styles use Tailwind classes + CSS variables
- Example: `bg-primary text-primary-foreground` (uses `--primary`, `--primary-foreground`)
- Responsive modifiers: `sm:text-sm`, `sm:h-8`
- Dark mode support: `dark:bg-input/32`, `dark:before:shadow-[0_-1px_--theme(--color-white/6%)]`

**shadcn-style components**:
- 40+ UI components in `components/ui/`
- Built on Base UI React primitives
- All use CSS variables and Tailwind
- Examples: alert, badge, button, card, checkbox, dialog, input, popover, select, sheet, sidebar, toast, etc.

#### **No CSS Modules or Plain CSS**

- All styling is Tailwind utility classes
- CSS variables for theming
- Single `index.css` with global styles and theme definitions
- Scrollbar styling: `::-webkit-scrollbar` in `index.css`
- Font-family: "DM Sans" (Google Font)

---

### 6. TypeScript & Import Conventions

#### **Path Aliases** (`apps/web/tsconfig.json`):
```json
{
  "paths": {
    "~/*": ["./src/*"]
  }
}
```

So:
- `~/components/ui/button` → `apps/web/src/components/ui/button`
- `~/lib/utils` → `apps/web/src/lib/utils`

#### **Workspace Imports**:
```typescript
import { ThreadId, type MessageId } from "@t3tools/contracts";
import { getModelOptions } from "@t3tools/shared/model";
```

#### **External Dependencies**:
- **UI Framework**: React 19 + React Router v1
- **State Management**: Zustand for stores, React Query for async
- **Form/Validation**: Effect Schema (not Zod)
- **Utilities**: 
  - `class-variance-authority` for component variants
  - `tailwind-merge` for smart class merging
  - `clsx` / custom `cn()` helper
- **Code Editor**: Lexical (rich text editor)
- **Terminal**: xterm with addons
- **Data Handling**: `@pierre/diffs` for diff rendering
- **Virtualization**: TanStack React Virtual

#### **No Global State Management for Theme**

- No Context providers detected
- No Redux
- appSettings uses `useSyncExternalStore` with localStorage

---

### 7. Dependencies Summary

**Web app key deps**:
```json
{
  "react": "^19.0.0",
  "@tanstack/react-router": "^1.160.2",
  "@tanstack/react-query": "^5.90.0",
  "tailwindcss": "^4.0.0",
  "@tailwindcss/vite": "^4.0.0",
  "class-variance-authority": "^0.7.1",
  "zustand": "^5.0.11",
  "effect": "catalog:",
  "lucide-react": "^0.564.0",
  "lexical": "^0.41.0",
  "@xterm/xterm": "^6.0.0"
}
```

**Server key deps**:
```json
{
  "effect": "catalog:",
  "@effect/platform-node": "catalog:",
  "@effect/sql-sqlite-bun": "catalog:",
  "node-pty": "^1.1.0"
}
```

---

### 8. Existing Theme-Related Code

**Dark mode detection** (`index.css`):
- Uses CSS custom variant that checks for `.dark` class
- Scrollbar styling changes with `.dark` class
- Color variables switch via `@variant dark` block

**No Runtime Theme Switching**:
- CSS variables are defined at root level
- Dark mode would require applying/removing `.dark` class on `<html>` or document root
- **No current mechanism to toggle theme or persist preference**

---

### 9. Build System & Commands

**Root scripts** (`turbo.json` + `package.json`):
```bash
npm run dev            # Run all dev servers
npm run dev:web       # Just web app
npm run dev:desktop   # Desktop app
npm run build         # Build all
npm run typecheck     # Type check all
npm run test          # Test all
npm run lint          # Lint with oxlint
```

**Web-specific**:
```bash
npm run dev           # Vite dev server on port 5733
npm run build         # Vite build → dist/
npm run typecheck     # tsc --noEmit
npm run test          # Vitest
```

---

### 10. Summary: Ready for Theme Implementation

**Current state**:
- ✅ CSS variable foundation in place (light/dark defined)
- ✅ Dark mode variant established (`.dark` class)
- ✅ AppSettings infrastructure exists (localStorage + Effect Schema)
- ✅ UI components support dark mode via CSS variables
- ❌ No theme toggle mechanism
- ❌ No theme setting in appSettings
- ❌ No dark class application logic

**Perfect starting point for adding a theme system**: You have all the infrastructure but need to:
1. Add `theme: "light" | "dark" | "system"` to `AppSettings`
2. Create a theme provider/hook to manage `.dark` class on document root
3. Add theme selector UI to settings page
4. Persist and hydrate theme preference

content.text:
Everything is clean. Here's a summary of every change made:

---

## What was built

### `packages/contracts/src/theme.ts` *(new)*
Defines the shared theme contract — no runtime logic, pure types and data:

- **`ThemeColors`** — interface with 7 semantic color roles: `background`, `foreground`, `accent`, `sidebar`, `editor`, `terminal`, `statusBar`
- **`ThemeId`** — `"t3-light" | "t3-dark" | "t3-midnight"`
- **`ThemePreference`** — `ThemeId | "system"` (the stored value; `"system"` auto-follows OS)
- **`AppTheme`** — full theme definition: id, name, description, `colorMode`, and preview `colors`
- **`BUILT_IN_THEMES`** — the three concrete themes with their swatch color palettes

### `packages/contracts/src/index.ts` *(edited)*
Added `export * from "./theme"` so all types are available via `@t3tools/contracts`.

### `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(rewritten)*
- Stores preference under the new key `t3code:theme:v2`; **automatically migrates** the old `t3code:theme` key (`"light"` → `"t3-dark"`, `"dark"` → `"t3-dark"`, `"system"` stays)
- `applyTheme()` now sets both `.dark` (for the Tailwind CSS variant) and `.theme-{id}` (for per-theme CSS overrides) on `<html>`, clearing stale theme classes first
- `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` is preserved unchanged — all existing consumers (`DiffPanel`, `ChatMarkdown`, `DiffWorkerPoolProvider`, `ChatView`) continue to work without modification
- New return values: `resolvedThemeId: ThemeId` and `themes: readonly AppTheme[]`

### `apps/web/src/index.css` *(edited)*
Added a `:root.dark.theme-t3-midnight { … }` block that overrides the full set of CSS custom properties with deep blue-black backgrounds and blue accents (`oklch(0.62 0.18 228)`), overriding the defaults only when both `.dark` and `.theme-t3-midnight` are present.

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Self-contained theme picker:
- **`ThemeSwatchPreview`** — a 40px miniature app-shell layout (sidebar / editor / terminal strip / status bar + accent dot) painted with the theme's actual hex colors
- **`SystemSwatchPreview`** — a split left-light / right-dark preview to communicate the "follows OS" behavior
- **`ThemeOption`** — an accessible `role="radio"` card with swatch, name, description, and an "Active" badge for the selected item
- **`ThemeSelector`** — the exported public component: a responsive `grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4` radiogroup (System + 3 themes) plus an "Active: …" status line

### `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` *(edited)*
Replaced the old hard-coded `THEME_OPTIONS` radio group and `useTheme` import in the Appearance section with a single `<ThemeSelector />` drop-in.
